textByHash.01b5564f711f41b753de2fe58c58cac4bf5df949: I've got to get out of here...
textByHash.0260e05f2f2bc31598090deb39010da0501879c0: But you will not need such weapons or armour, for Agrith-Naar will grant you the power of life and death over all creatures!
textByHash.04543b8b8aec1dfcff5937c9c4c707b1cd6d6294: So you wish to join us? You have made a wise choice. When we summon the demon Agrith-Naar, he will grant all our worldly desires.
textByHash.06fc0c30f68f57fa289b8ef8895cffc358e85ac4: You shall have every wish granted, and everyone who has ever wronged you will burn in a hell of your own devising!
textByHash.0aba2ba2ce87cbe04149c810952250d61de1ebbd: Leave me alone! I am preparing for the summoning ritual. You should make yourself a demonic sigil and practice the incantation with the other wizards.
textByHash.0ec6280ba182b0603c98836d61e0785fd7c31769: Player, please take your place in the circle!
textByHash.1715a836c0c47bf93a0da7c12ac95e204d5aafa0: You will also need to make yourself a demonic sigil to act as a focus of power. One of the group has the mould you need to make it.
textByHash.1fc8e5e966285f71796e783f009895b510453c96: Now let me continue with my preparations!
textByHash.2c39c6b8c6de15b217a845d60125315357c7dcbc: Right and wrong are for the weak! This is your chance to choose to be on the side of the strong, and have all your desires granted, while the weak are crushed beneath Agrith-Naar's demonic feet!
textByHash.2fead2b9d0f130ef69bf24914f331604e58287d7: Ha ha ha! At last you are free, my demonic brother! Rest now, and then have your revenge on this pitiful city!
textByHash.42efc984d4b79642fae69f6fc806b554241766cf: Indeed? Well we are one wizard short since Josef ran away. Can you vouch for him?
textByHash.476fe0fa0a1835e96681bcd2ef67b116027c18c9: You must memorize the incantation carefully. It is Nahudu Camerinthum Caldar Agrith-Naar Tarren.
textByHash.4c130312dd38f3c2c2fd06dec39aeb23ffca778b: Ignoramus! Are you incapable of even the simplest task? The incantation is Nahudu Camerinthum Caldar Agrith- Naar Tarren.
textByHash.8ed0e0cd016464f9e893fa6a562ee351abf2c950: Arise, O mighty Delrith! Bring destruction to this soft, weak city!
textByHash.913818e4b95034cfcfe3904c247fee0f95c2ab8f: Obviously he was a coward who did not have the strength to abandon his old-fashioned morality. I hope you will not be a similar disappointment.
textByHash.9d60c2fb2a5e55f200a8e63057a40c43cb357d1b: Noo! Not Silverlight! Delrith is not ready yet!
textByHash.ac191f78055ce0044edb81716919a0026efe932f: will lead us in the incantation.
textByHash.acfb3ca342f157f7051b92fc32bdd0e8be51f226: When I have finished preparing the magic circle, we will all recite the incantation that will summon Agrith-Naar.
textByHash.ad85b7cb5de5ab7ed8839b5714278a983b72f911: Indeed? Well we are one wizard short since Josef ran away. Can you vouch for her?
textByHash.c1af3f85d21ec03bdc4fc58e3e39565880d24058: You fool! Do it again, and get it right!
textByHash.c819e9b9fb0f65bd4d25fd24769a635a4e7b9385: An abyssal whip, a dragon chain mail? To conjure these items is trivial for Agrith-Naar.
textByHash.dddfd15c17d29d6dc74e2863109aee7e61f913f6: My binding spells will make Agrith-Naar my slave! You would be wise not to question my powers again, lest I turn the same spells on you!
textByHash.e1096328957e68b4da83196d6a6b670eb17d2a83: It is time for the ritual to commence!
